productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men  Fiesta Brown Casual Shoes
description: buckaroo comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. A cheeky take on the classic penny loafer, this two-hole lace up leather shoe also references the conservative derby in its styling. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt.UpperFull grain leather upper with stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heelStitches on the seams of the toe boxTwo-hole lace upsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel and circular lugs for gripShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
